holdings.infoBox: CHPX is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 12.56%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 9.73%, NVIDIA at 8.90%, Broadcom at 8.41%, and Arm Holdings at 5.38%.

overview.description: The Global X AI Semiconductor & Quantum ETF (CHPX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Global X AI Semiconductor & Quantum index. The fund tracks a modified market cap-weighted index that provides global exposure to technology companies that enable the development of Artificial Intelligence (AI). CHPX was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Global X AI Semiconductor & Quantum Index

data.title: Semiconductor ETFs: The Trade Broadens
data.text: Several years ago, semiconductor ETFs were often viewed as a Nvidia (NVDA) story. With Nvidia driving much of the group's growth and performance, some investors questioned the need for broader exposur...
